languages.original_text: {n}A pause. The Tech-Priest's gaze softens.{/n} "He also adds that the thought of working with anyone other than me evokes repulsion and outrage in him. The value coefficient of our relationship is extremely high in his catalogue."

languages.text: {n}Пауза. Взгляд техножреца смягчается.{/n} "Он также добавляет, что мысль о работе с кем-либо, кроме меня, вызывает у него отторжение и негодование. Коэффицент ценности наших отношений крайне высок в его каталоге".

{n}A pause. The Tech-Priest's gaze softens.{/n} "He also adds that the thought of working with anyone other than me evokes repulsion and outrage in him. The value coefficient of our relationship is extremely high in his catalogue."

languages.text: {n}Se produce una pausa. La mirada del tecnosacerdote se suaviza.{/n} «También añade que la idea de trabajar con alguien que no sea yo le causa rechazo e indignación. El coeficiente de valor de nuestra relación es extremadamente elevado en su catálogo».
languages.original_text: {n}A pause. The Tech-Priest's gaze softens.{/n} "He also adds that the thought of working with anyone other than me evokes repulsion and outrage in him. The value coefficient of our relationship is extremely high in his catalogue."

traits.locale_text: {n}Se produce una pausa. La mirada del tecnosacerdote se suaviza.{/n} «También añade que la idea de trabajar con alguien que no sea yo le causa rechazo e indignación. El coeficiente de valor de nuestra relación es extremadamente elevado en su catálogo».

languages.text: {n}短暂沉默后，技术神甫的目光柔和下来。{/n}“他还补充说，一想到要和除我以外的人合作，他就会感到厌恶和愤怒。在他的评估体系里，我们这段关系的价值系数非常高。”
languages.original_text: {n}A pause. The Tech-Priest's gaze softens.{/n} "He also adds that the thought of working with anyone other than me evokes repulsion and outrage in him. The value coefficient of our relationship is extremely high in his catalogue."

traits.locale_text: {n}短暂沉默后，技术神甫的目光柔和下来。{/n}“他还补充说，一想到要和除我以外的人合作，他就会感到厌恶和愤怒。在他的评估体系里，我们这段关系的价值系数非常高。”

languages.text: {n}Le technoprêtre s'interrompt, puis son regard s'adoucit.{/n} « Il tient aussi à ajouter que la simple idée de travailler avec quelqu'un d'autre que moi le remplit de dégoût et le révolte. Le coefficient de valeur de notre relation est extrêmement élevé dans sa liste. »
languages.original_text: {n}A pause. The Tech-Priest's gaze softens.{/n} "He also adds that the thought of working with anyone other than me evokes repulsion and outrage in him. The value coefficient of our relationship is extremely high in his catalogue."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le technoprêtre s'interrompt, puis son regard s'adoucit.{/n} « Il tient aussi à ajouter que la simple idée de travailler avec quelqu'un d'autre que moi le remplit de dégoût et le révolte. Le coefficient de valeur de notre relation est extrêmement élevé dans sa liste. »

languages.text: {n}Eine Pause. Die Miene des Techpriesters hellt sich auf.{/n} "Er fügt überdies hinzu, dass der Gedanke, mit jemand anderem außer mir zu arbeiten, Ekel und Wut in ihm weckt. Der Wertkoeffizient unserer Beziehung ist in seinem Register extrem hoch."
languages.original_text: {n}A pause. The Tech-Priest's gaze softens.{/n} "He also adds that the thought of working with anyone other than me evokes repulsion and outrage in him. The value coefficient of our relationship is extremely high in his catalogue."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eine Pause. Die Miene des Techpriesters hellt sich auf.{/n} "Er fügt überdies hinzu, dass der Gedanke, mit jemand anderem außer mir zu arbeiten, Ekel und Wut in ihm weckt. Der Wertkoeffizient unserer Beziehung ist in seinem Register extrem hoch."

languages.text: {n}間。技術司祭の視線が和らぐ。{/n}「彼はまた、私以外の人間と仕事をすることを考えると、反発と憤慨を呼び起こすと付け加えた。彼のカタログでは、私たちの関係の価値係数は極めて高いのです」。
languages.original_text: {n}A pause. The Tech-Priest's gaze softens.{/n} "He also adds that the thought of working with anyone other than me evokes repulsion and outrage in him. The value coefficient of our relationship is extremely high in his catalogue."

languages.text: {n}Bir duraksama yaşanıyor. Tekno Rahip'in bakışları yumuşuyor.{/n} "Ayrıca benden başka biriyle çalışma düşüncesinin onda tiksinti ve öfke uyandırdığını da ekliyor. İlişkimizin değer katsayısı, kendisinin kataloğunda son derece yüksekmiş."
